## Brief

- Core message: Code Grinds’ Code Breach reboot brings a cyberpunk aesthetic to the tower-defense-meets-coding experience, with enhanced AI guidance, richer visuals, and deeper coding concept visualization in the gameplay loop.
- CTA: Explore the Code Breach overhaul in our latest update and try the new cyberpunk towers today.
- Visual brief: Showcase a cyberpunk-themed Code Breach battle scene: towers representing ForLoop, WhileLoop, IfCondition with neon-lit UI, code snippets flowing between towers, and dynamic particle effects; include a prominent CodeGrind branding element.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
